codeReview.summary: The frontend components were successfully deconstructed. App.tsx is now a clean shell layout delegating to ChatArea and ScreenSharePanel. LandingPage.tsx was modularized into distinct semantic components like HeroSection and CapabilitiesSection. The 'Launch App' button now links correctly to '#/brainstorm'. The worker also correctly verified that the missing imports in BrainstormUnifiedLayout.tsx were already present.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used 'grep' which failed, then switched to PowerShell 'Select-String'. The agent environment runs on Windows PowerShell, meaning Unix-specific CLI utilities might fail, despite the existence of bash-centric dev scripts like 'dev.sh'.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows a failed tool call: 'grep -rn "downloadSingleArtifact" frontend/src' followed later by a successful PowerShell equivalent: 'Select-String -Pattern "downloadSingleArtifact" frontend/src/components/brainstorm/BrainstormUnifiedLayout.tsx'

summary: Review passed successfully. Feature requirements were met fully with clean, modular code. App.tsx and LandingPage.tsx are properly decoupled.
